---
title: ""
output: html_document
---

```{r eval=F, echo=F}
filn <- 'Stylized_model'
abs_path <- function(){rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()}
rmarkdown::render(paste0(abs_path(),'/vignettes/',filn,'.Rmd'))
```

```{r include=FALSE}
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(purrr)
library(randNames)
library(openxlsx)
library(patchwork)
library(writexl)
library(plotly)
library(ViewPipeSteps)
library(RefManageR)
library(ggpubr)
library(ManifoldDestiny)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r, eval=T, message=F, warning=F, echo=F}
sourcef <- 'stylized.R'
abs_path <- function(){rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()}
source(paste0(abs_path(),'/inst/script/',sourcef))
```

# Test abc

```{r}
plotly::subplot(ggt2a,ggt2b,nrows=2)
```

```{r}
gcou$plotly3d(partition=1)[[3]]
```

```{r}
gcou$plotly3d(partition=1)[[1]]
```
